name: yamlize

metadata.name: yamlize
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: yamlize, a package for Python object serialization and data validation.

documentation: see https://github.com/SimplyKnownAsG/yamlize/blob/master/README.rst

classes.name: yamlize.yamlizable.Strong
documentation:
The Strongly typed Yamlizable subclass. Subclasses of Strong are dynamically created on demand
when someone creates an Attribute with `type=sometype`.

Note that there may never be an instance of a Strongint. If there were, it would actually get
more complicated because we currently rely upon `ruamel.yaml` to give us rational representers
and composers. If an `int` was cast to a `Strongint`, then we would need to add a
representer into the `ruamel.yaml.Dumper`.

methods.name: yamlize.objects._AliasLink.try_set_attr
documentation:
Attempts to set obj attribute from parent, returns True if successful,
otherwise False.

methods.name: yamlize.objects._AliasLink.is_parent
documentation: Returns a list of possibly inherited attribute names.

methods.name: yamlize.round_trip_data.RoundTripData.__reduce__
documentation:
Used for pickling, results in a loss of data.

Some objects from ruamel.yaml do not appear to be pickleable.

functions.name: yamlize.maps._all_bases
documentation: returns a set of subclasses from bases tuple that would be passed in type.__init__

classes.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__new__
documentation:
Explicit implementation of \_\_new\_\_ to assign \_\_data as an attribute.

```
param *args

sequence of key/value pairs.

param **kwargs

kwargs for input to OrderedDict.
```

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a Map.

```
param *args

sequence of key/value pairs.

param **kwargs

kwargs for input to OrderedDict.
```

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__getattr__
documentation:
Get attribute if it does not exist on the class already, by assuming it
is implemented in the underlying OrderedDict.

```
param attr_name

attribute name to retrieve
```

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__iter__
documentation: Iterate over the items in the collection.

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__repr__
documentation: String representation of the collection - behaves like an OrderedDict.

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__str__
documentation: String representation of the collection - behaves like an OrderedDict.

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__len__
documentation: Returns the number of items in the collection.

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__contains__
documentation:
Returns True if the collection contains the key, otherwise False.

```
param key

key of item in collection
```

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__getitem__
documentation:
Get an item from the Map, or raise a KeyError if it is not in the
collection.

```
param key

key of the item entry
```

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__setitem__
documentation:
Set an item in the collection based on the key.

```
param key

key of item

param value

value of the item
```

methods.name: yamlize.maps.__MapBase.__delitem__
documentation:
Remove an item from the collection

```
param key

key of the item in the collection
```

__MapBase is a wrapper around and OrderedDict.

Base class for other maps, provides wrapper methods to the underlying
OrderedDict.

classes.name: yamlize.maps.Map
documentation: Basic Map is an ordered dictionary of keys/values.

classes.name: yamlize.attributes.Attribute
documentation:
Represents an attribute of a Python class, and a key/value pair in YAML.

# Attributes

name

: name of the attribute within the Python class

key

: name of the attribute within the YAML representation

type

: type of the attribute within the Python class. When `ANY`, the type
  is a pass-through and whatever YAML determines it should be will be
  applied.

default

: default value if not supplied in YAML. If `default=NODEFAULT`, then
  the attribute must be supplied.

storage_name

: `'_yamlized_' + name`, stored as a separate attribute for speed.

classes.name: yamlize.attributes.MapItem
documentation:
Represents a key of a dictionary, and a key/value pair in YAML.

This should only be used temporarily.

classes.name: yamlize.attributes.KeyedListItem
documentation:
Represents a key of a dictionary, and a key/value pair in YAML.

This should only be used temporarily.
